description: Author a just-culture policy and its decision tree — the culpability / substitution-test line between acceptable and unacceptable behaviour — per the ICAO Annex 19 Safety Promotion pillar. Use this skill to draft or review a just-culture policy for a named aircraft operator, airport, or AMO, including the decision-tree that distinguishes honest error and at-risk behaviour from reckless/negligent conduct. Grounds in KB-STD-ICAO-ANNEX19, runs the de-identification scrub first so no reporter is named in an example, and produces a policy with an explicit decision line — never a vague slogan-only statement. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: aviation-just-culture-policy
